programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ike Hanau
programme.desc: The wife of one of Grover's closest friends falls to her death; Dr. Shaw and Danny are stuck in an elevator with a body that needs processing.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ua helele'i ka hoku
programme.desc: After a murder takes place at a convention of Elvis impersonators, the victim's body is stolen; Gabriel asks Chin for help.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ho'amoano
programme.desc: When a dead woman is found in a hotel suite belonging to three married, hungover men, the team must help them retrace their steps as they try to remember what happened -- and find the killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Mo'o 'olelo Pu
programme.desc: During a solo outrigger trip, Kono encounters bad weather and must fight for her life; the Five-0 investigates a man in trouble for cooking meth.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Luapo'i
programme.desc: After apprehending a fugitive, a bounty hunter is murdered; Rachel reveals a secret to Danny that has ramifications; Chin talks to McGarrett about his concerns regarding Adam.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: A Make Kaua
programme.desc: On the eve of Adam and Kono's wedding, the Five-0 must stop a fanatical patriot who wants to detonate stolen nuclear warheads and place the blame on a terrorist -- resulting in a new war on terror.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Guts + Fuel + Hope
programme.desc: MacGyver and Riley must find a way to drive a tanker filled with liquid oxygen through a region occupied by rebels and deliver it to a children's hospital; Riley helps MacGyver decide whether to allow his father back into his life.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Dia de Muertos + Sicarios + Family
programme.desc: Mac and Jack rush to Mexico to help capture the leader of a drug cartel while the country celebrates Día de Muertos.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Murdoc + MacGyver + Murdoc
programme.desc: Murdoc abducts MacGyver's girlfriend to force Mac to help him rescue his son from a kidnapper; a dangerous person from Murdoc's personal life shows up, giving Mac a glimpse into the villain's past.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Scavengers + Hard Drive + Dragonfly
programme.desc: Matty sends the team to Ghana to recover a hard drive from an e-waste landfill that is run by a powerful and violent man, leading them to speculate about what could be on the device.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Revenge + Catacombs + Le Fantome
programme.desc: An Irish military intelligence officer claims to know the whereabouts of a lethal bomb maker whom Mac has been hunting for years.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Specimen 234 + PAPR + Outbreak
programme.desc: When a vial containing a deadly virus is stolen from the Center for Disease Control in Atlanta, MacGyver and team race to recover it before the thief unleashes a global pandemic.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Matty + Ethan + Fidelity
programme.desc: Matty reveals the shocking secret that her husband has been undercover in a criminal organization for eight years; when his status as a CIA agent comes out, Matty needs MacGyver to find and extract her husband before it's too late.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Mac + Fallout + Jack
programme.desc: Mac and Jack's mini-vacation is cut short when someone from their past abducts them and locks them in a concrete room; Matty tasks Riley, Bozer and Leanna with stealing a diamond encoded with terrorist intelligence from a princess in Milan.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Forever People
programme.desc: The investigation into frozen bodies found floating in a body of water in Nevada leads the team to believe the victims were members of a cult; J.J. confronts her trauma over her abduction.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Anonymous
programme.desc: The team searches for a killer who calls the authorities before committing his crimes; as Rossi prepares for a visit with his daughter, he gets news about the death of an old friend.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Nelson's Sparrow
programme.desc: The members of the BAU team are brought back to their origins as they look at one of Gideon and Rossi's old cases.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Hero Worship
programme.desc: When a hero emerges from the wreckage of an explosion in Indianapolis, the BAU team members must protect him as they try to identify the person responsible before more bombings occur.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Scream
programme.desc: The members of the BAU team search for a suspect who may have witnessed abuse as a child; Kate is worried when her niece and a friend make plans with a boy they met online.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Lockdown
programme.desc: When two guards at a maximum security prison are murdered, the BAU team thinks one or more people within the prison walls may be responsible.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Breath Play
programme.desc: The BAU tracks a serial killer in Wisconsin; Kate is faced with trouble when her niece, Meg, starts acting out.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Rock Creek Park
programme.desc: When an up-and-coming congressman's wife disappears, the team investigates his political enemies as potential suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: International Unit Chief Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) and his team requires assistance from the BAU when a family of four is abducted during their Barbados vacation.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: A Place at the Table
programme.desc: When the members of a family are found murdered at their dining room table, the team looks for secrets in their past; Hotch tries to make peace with his father-in-law (Ed Asner).

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Mr. Scratch
programme.desc: When three alleged murderers claim that they were attacked by a monster at the moment of the crimes, the BAU searches for a suspect who controls minds; the hunt puts one team member in danger.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Protection
programme.desc: The BAU tracks a vigilante in Los Angeles who is shooting people with possible ties to criminal activity.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Hunt
programme.desc: The team suspects Kate's niece and her friend were kidnapped by an online predator involved in sex trafficking and race to find them before they are hurt.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Job
programme.desc: The BAU interviews candidates to take the opening left by Kate's departure; the team tracks a serial killer who leaves behind evidence that indicates a person intent on revenge.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Witness
programme.desc: The team must find the person responsible for a sarin gas attack on a Los Angeles bus before a larger incident occurs.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: 'Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: The team suspects a jilted unknown subject is responsible when brides are murdered on the eve of their nuptials.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Slow Burn
programme.desc: A controlled fire in the Everglades reveals the body of a slain hunter, then a wall of fire overtakes Alexx and Delko at the crime scene, forcing them to take refuge under a tarpaulin.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Stalkerazzi
programme.desc: Horatio infers that a slain photographer accidentally witnessed a murder while snapping pictures of a famous actor.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Invasion
programme.desc: A former surf champion is murdered in his home, while his wife and son are left beaten and bound.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Robbers steal $2.3 million from an armored truck in downtown Miami, but the loot turns out to be counterfeit, and the team must figure out what happened to the bank's money before it was replaced with fake bills.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Wannabe
programme.desc: The detectives' case hinges on the testimony of a forensic-evidence collector who stole a latex glove from the crime scene; co-workers become prime suspects in a waitress's death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Deadline
programme.desc: A newspaper reporter witnesses the murder of his friend in Miami's drug district, but Horatio mistrusts the slick young man's version of what happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: The Oath
programme.desc: When evidence suggests a slain police officer was crooked, Horatio must find the killer in order to clear the victim's name.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Not Landing
programme.desc: The team investigates the wealthy residents of an airpark after a prop plane crashes into a Miami Beach.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Rap Sheet
programme.desc: The team investigates the dangerous world of personal security when a rap star's (Xzibit) bodyguard is shot and killed during a concert.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: MIA/NYC - NonStop
programme.desc: Horatio goes to New York to work with his counterparts on a murder investigation. Guest star Gary Sinise.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Innocent
programme.desc: All evidence points to the film distributor, who also happens to be a registered sex offender, in the investigation of an adult film star's murder, but an accident at the lab may taint a key piece of evidence.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: Lost Son
programme.desc: When a man is murdered as he tries to pay his son's ransom with $3 million worth of jewels, the CSI team is called to investigate and one member of the group is killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Memories in the Shallow Grave
programme.desc: A woman's remains are found in a paintball field; Booth and Brennan adjust to life as an expectant couple.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Hot Dog in the Competition

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Prince in the Plastic
programme.desc: Booth and Sweets are given access to a toy company's headquarters after an executive's remains are found packaged with a Prince Charming doll; Sweets prepares for his gun certification test; Brennan worries about motherhood.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Male in the Mail
programme.desc: After dismembered remains are found in multiple mailing boxes, the team uncovers a complicated love triangle; Booth's grandfather reveals surprising news; Special Agent Genny Shaw (Tina Majorino) learns how important teamwork is.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Twist in the Twister
programme.desc: The team suspects murder when a storm chaser is killed while filming a tornado; Booth becomes increasingly protective of Brennan.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Crack in the Code
programme.desc: After a cryptic message written in human blood is found at a national monument, the team ends up embarking on a scavenger hunt; Brennan and Booth search for their perfect family home.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Prisoner in the Pipe
programme.desc: When the remains of an escaped convict are found in the sewer, the investigation reveals the man died in prison; Brennan gives birth in unconventional circumstances.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Bump in the Road
programme.desc: When an extreme couponer's remains are found on the side of a road, the investigation leads the team to the supermarket where she shopped; Brennan adjusts to being at work and away from her baby; Cam is unhappy with her daughter's choice of suitors.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Don't in the Do
programme.desc: A corpse that has been dyed blue is found in a landfill; when Bones feels uncomfortable in her post-baby body, Booth tries to boost her self-confidence.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Warrior in the Wuss
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan investigate the death of a truck company employee whose body is found in the woods; Hodgins buys new lab equipment; Brennan worries about Parker's return from England.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Family in the Feud
programme.desc: When a corpse is discovered in the woods, the team considers two families involved in a nearly century-long feud; Brennan is apprehensive when her father (Ryan O'Neal) offers to baby-sit for her daughter.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Suit on the Set
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles to consult on a film based on her latest book, Brennan discovers the prop cadaver being used is a murder victim; Booth gets a job offer; embarrassing information about Cam's past comes out.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.sub-title: Some Kinda Love
programme.desc: After Toby hooks up with a woman at a nightclub, she is found dead, and he is a suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.sub-title: Lisa Says
programme.desc: When Toby saves a troubled teen from a gang beating, he stumbles upon a hidden group of runaways.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.sub-title: Foggy Notion
programme.desc: Toby tries to help the sister of a shooting victim find out who killed her brother.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.sub-title: Iris
programme.desc: When Toby sees a woman revive a badly injured baby, he becomes curious about her gift.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Silencer
programme.desc: The BAU investigates when a prisoner escapes and starts leaving behind victims with his unique trademark; the team gets to know its newest member.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Pact
programme.desc: When a murder victim is discovered in San Diego and another is found in Los Angeles, the team thinks a murderous duo is responsible.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Through the Looking Glass
programme.desc: When one Kansas family goes missing and another one turns up dead, the team looks for a link between the cases; Beth has surprising news for Hotch.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: God Complex
programme.desc: The BAU team pursues an amateur surgeon who amputates limbs from his victims; Reid's calls to a mystery woman create intrigue.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Good Earth
programme.desc: When four men from Oregon go missing, the team looks for a common link; J.J. is upset when her son doesn't want to celebrate Halloween.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Apprenticeship
programme.desc: The team searches for a killer in Miami who started out slaying animals and then quickly progressed to murdering prostitutes; Morgan asks Reid to join the bureau softball team.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Fallen
programme.desc: The team travels to Santa Monica when burned bodies start showing up on a pier; Rossi gets together with his former Marine sergeant from Vietnam.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Wheels on the Bus ..
programme.desc: The BAU team springs into action when a school bus full of children goes missing near Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Magnificent Light
programme.desc: A popular motivational speaker comes under suspicion when a conference attendee is murdered; Garcia is confused when Morgan doesn't want to attend a dinner honoring a family friend.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Lesson
programme.desc: When multiple dead men are found, the BAU tracks a killer with ritualistic tendencies; Reid is anxious when faced with an opportunity to meet his mystery woman.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Perennials
programme.desc: The team tracks a suspect who shares the same style as a serial killer from 30 years ago; someone tracks the BAU's cases and replicates crimes.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Zugzwang
programme.desc: With the help of the BAU team, Reid tries to find his girlfriend before it's too late.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Magnum Opus
programme.desc: As Reid deals with a personal loss, the rest of the team heads to San Francisco after victims are found in the Mission District.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: All That Remains
programme.desc: When an author's daughter goes missing on the anniversary of his wife's disappearance, the team investigates the author as a possible suspect.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Broken
programme.desc: The team heads to Austin to investigate when victims with watches set to inaccurate times are discovered; the team's stalker gets closer.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Carbon Copy
programme.desc: Victims of the Replicator, the BAU's stalker, turn up in Philadelphia; the members of the team think they are getting close to apprehending their suspect.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: The Gathering
programme.desc: The team investigates victims who were sharing details about their personal lives and inner desires online; Kevin becomes jealous when he finds out that Garcia might have a new love interest.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Restoration
programme.desc: When the team goes to Morgan's old neighborhood to track an UnSub targeting middle-aged men, Morgan suspects they are looking for someone connected to the man who abused him as a child.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: A 25-year-old time capsule opened in a small Colorado town reveals a gruesome discovery and a possible connection to a local police officer's death.

programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.sub-title: Alchemy
programme.desc: The team heads to Rapid City when two men are murdered in a ritualistic way; Reid mourns Maeve's death.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Wilderness + Training + Survival
programme.desc: When MacGyver takes Riley and Bozer into the wilderness for survival training, things take a turn when they run into a violent group of criminals; Jack and Matty go on a road trip to place Matty's ex-husband and his family in witness protection.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Father + Bride + Betrayal
programme.desc: An international crime boss offers to surrender if he's allowed to return to the United States to watch his daughter walk down the aisle; MacGyver and the team crash the wedding to ensure the crime lord doesn't run.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: K9 + Smugglers + New Recruit
programme.desc: After a surprising introduction to Phoenix's newest recruit, Desi, MacGyver and team are assigned to protect a gun-sniffing dog who has a bounty on its head.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Lidar + Rogues + Duty
programme.desc: The Phoenix must recover the body of a pilot whose plane crashed while testing an experimental laser mapping system that MacGyver designed; Riley tries to identify the hacker who tricked a SWAT team into arresting her and Elwood.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Seeds + Permafrost + Feather
programme.desc: MacGyver and the team are asked to solve a locked-door mystery when a man working inside a remote, ultra-secure international seed vault disappears.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Murdoc + Helman + Hit
programme.desc: When Nicholas Helman resurfaces to carry out a killing spree, the team is forced to get help from the one person who knows him best -- his protégé, Murdoc.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.sub-title: Friends + Enemies + Border
programme.desc: MacGyver and Desi help a group of Syrian refugees who are being pursued by human traffickers; Bozer is trapped in Oversight's car, and it's rigged to explode.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Gamer in the Grease
programme.desc: The remains of a competitive gamer are found in a grease truck; Sweets, Hodgins and Jeffersonian intern Colin camp out for tickets to a movie premiere.

programme.sub-title: The Goop on the Girl

programme.sub-title: The X in the File
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth travel to Mexico to investigate human remains with extraterrestrial attributes; Angela and intern Wendell come clean about their relationship.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Proof in the Pudding
programme.desc: Government agents demand that Brennan and her team determine a cause of death for an unidentified and highly classified set of remains; Cam thinks Michelle is keeping a secret from her.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Dentist in the Ditch

programme.sub-title: The Devil in the Details
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate a set of uniquely disfigured remains allegorizing biblical text; a Jeffersonian intern reveals a secret about his past.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: Bones on the Blue Line

programme.sub-title: The Death of the Queen Bee

programme.desc: Brennan and Booth are asked to identify human remains found inside the belly of a shark; a marine biologist (Rena Sofer) is interested in Booth.

programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. To stop the criminals, a trio of specialist soldiers are called in. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?

programme.title: River Of Death
programme.desc: An adventurer decides to go in search of a lost city in the Amazon jungle, and is joined by a motley crew of other people with reasons of their own. But to their horror, instead of treasure, they find a Nazi doctor occupying the lost city who is still doing his experiments on people.

programme.title: Banana Joe
programme.desc: Banana Joe lives in a tropical village in Africa which is unaffected by modern life. One day he discovers he needs a permit to operate his boat so goes off to the big city to get one. programme.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
programme.desc: In a rare moment of compassion, Lone Wolf rescues a girl who has killed a pimp in self-defense. By his code, he is forced to endure being tortured to within an inch of his life. Lone Wolf takes to the road again, where his expertise is very much in demand, so much so that a would-be employer had already had a contract placed on him. The slayer with the baby cart proceeds down bloodstained paths to Hades.

programme.desc: John Rambo is released from prison by the government for a top-secret covert mission to the last place on Earth he'd want to return - the jungles of Vietnam.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Autobots and Decepticons are at war, with humans on the sidelines. Optimus Prime is gone. The key to saving our future lies buried in the secrets of the past, in the hidden history of Transformers on Earth.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Rick and Evelyn O'Connell, along with their 8 year old son Alex, discover the key to the legendary Scorpion King's might, the fabled Bracelet of Anubis. Unfortunately, a newly resurrected Imhotep has designs on the bracelet as well, and isn't above kidnapping its new bearer, Alex, to gain control of Anubis' otherworldly army.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: Hassled by the school bullies, Daniel LaRusso has his share of adolescent woes. Luckily, his apartment building houses a resident martial arts master: Kesuke Miyagi, who agrees to train Daniel ... and ends up teaching him much more than self-defense. Armed with newfound confidence, skill and wisdom, Daniel ultimately faces off against his tormentors in this hugely popular classic underdog tale.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: For nine generations an evil sorcerer has been victorious in hand-to-hand battle against his mortal enemies. If he wins a tenth Mortal Kombat tournament, desolation and evil will reign over the multiverse forever. To save Earth, three warriors must overcome seemingly insurmountable odds, their own inner demons, and superhuman foes in this action/adventure movie based on one of the most popular video games of all time.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when a criminal mastermind reveals the identities of all active undercover agents in Britain. The secret service can now rely on only one man - Johnny English. Currently teaching at a minor prep school, Johnny springs back into action to find the mysterious hacker. For this mission to succeed, he’ll need all of his skills - what few he has - as the man with yesterday’s analogue methods faces off against tomorrow’s digital technology.

programme.title: Vehicle 19
programme.desc: A parolee (Paul Walker) becomes the target of a massive police manhunt after inadvertently picking up a rental car with a female whistleblower tied up in the trunk. Now, as the police attempt to silence the woman before she can testify about the city's rampant corruption, the ex-con who just regained his freedom must defend her life, and clear his own name.

programme.title: The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: A prominent Indian anchor interviews famous celebrities and brings out their fun side by talking about their life and love stories. India 2019.

programme.title: Kung Fu Yoga
programme.desc: Two professors team up to locate a lost treasure and embark on an adventure that takes them from a Tibetan ice cave to Dubai, and to a mountain temple in India.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
programme.desc: 64 years before he becomes the tyrannical president of Panem, Coriolanus Snow sees a chance for a change in fortunes when he mentors Lucy Gray Baird, the female tribute from District 12.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: Supervillains Harley Quinn, Bloodsport, Peacemaker and a collection of nutty cons at Belle Reve prison join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X as they are dropped off at the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man II
programme.desc: For Peter Parker, life is busy. Between taking out the bad guys as Spider-Man and spending time with the person he loves, Gwen Stacy, high school graduation cannot come quickly enough. Peter has not forgotten about the promise he made to Gwen’s father to protect her by staying away, but that is a promise he cannot keep. Things will change for Peter when a new villain, Electro, emerges, an old friend, Harry Osborn, returns, and Peter uncovers new clues about his past.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After being bitten by a genetically altered spider at Oscorp, nerdy but endearing high school student Peter Parker is endowed with amazing powers to become the superhero known as Spider-Man.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: The adventures of a heroic and debonair stalwart mouse named Stuart Little with human qualities, who faces some comic misadventures while searching for his lost bird friend and living with a human family as their child.

programme.title: The Matrix Resurrections
programme.desc: Plagued by strange memories, Neo's life takes an unexpected turn when he finds himself back inside the Matrix.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: John Rambo is released from prison by the government for a top-secret covert mission to the last place on Earth he'd want to return - the jungles of Vietnam.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Retired from active duty to train new IMF agents, Ethan Hunt is called back into action to confront sadistic arms dealer, Owen Davian. Hunt must try to protect his girlfriend while working with his new team to complete the mission.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
programme.desc: There is a new criminal mastermind at large (Professor Moriarty) and not only is he Holmes’ intellectual equal, but his capacity for evil and lack of conscience may give him an advantage over the detective.

programme.desc: Seagal stars as mob kingpin Mr. Alexander, an old-school boss who rules his criminal empire with both nobility and brutality. For a simple prison hit, he sends his best enforcer and protégé Roman Hurs.
